# Proyecto Análisis de Regresión
### Grupo 6 - SAT-GPA

<!-- ```{r}
install.packages("here")
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("xtable")
```  -->
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(xtable)
# Cargar datos
library(here)
satgpa <- read_csv(here("data", "satgpa_clean.csv"))
```

```{r}
# train test split
set.seed(2307)
train_indices <- sample(1:nrow(satgpa), size = 0.8 * nrow(satgpa))
satgpa_train <- satgpa[train_indices, ]
satgpa_test <- satgpa[-train_indices, ]

satgpa_train$sex_factor <- as.factor(satgpa_train$sex_factor)
satgpa_test$sex_factor  <- factor(satgpa_test$sex_factor,
                                  levels = levels(satgpa_train$sex_factor))
```

```{r}
# primer modelo
# solo hs_gpa, con intercepto
modelo_hs_gpa <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa, data = satgpa_train)

# ajuste
summary(modelo_hs_gpa)
confint(modelo_hs_gpa, level = 0.95)

# predicción
pred_test <- predict(modelo_hs_gpa, newdata = satgpa_test)

# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_hs_gpa, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_hs_gpa, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# segundo modelo
# hs_gpa + sat_sum
modelo_hs_sats <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_sum, data = satgpa_train)
# ajuste
summary(modelo_hs_sats)
confint(modelo_hs_sats, level = 0.95)
# predicción
pred_test_hs_sats <- predict(modelo_hs_sats, newdata = satgpa_test)
# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_hs_sats, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_hs_sats, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# tercer modelo
# hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m
modelo_hs_sats_v_m <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m, data = satgpa_train)
# ajuste
summary(modelo_hs_sats_v_m)
confint(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, level = 0.95)
# predicción
pred_test_hs_sats_v_m <- predict(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, newdata = satgpa_test)
# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats_v_m)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats_v_m))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats_v_m)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# cuarto modelo
# hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor
modelo_full <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)
# ajuste
summary(modelo_full)
confint(modelo_full, level = 0.95)
# predicción
pred_test_full <- predict(modelo_full, newdata = satgpa_test)
# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_full)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_full))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_full)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_full, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_full, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# quinto modelo (Modelo de Interacción)
# sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor + interacción (hs_gpa con sex_factor)
modelo_inter <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa * sex_factor + sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)



# ajuste
summary(modelo_inter)
confint(modelo_inter, level = 0.95)

# predicción
pred_test_inter <- predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test)

# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# Tests F parciales (modelos anidados)


# M1 → M2: sat_sum
anova(modelo_hs_gpa, modelo_hs_sats)

# M1 → M3: sat_v + sat_m 
anova(modelo_hs_gpa, modelo_hs_sats_v_m)

# M3 → M4:  sex_factor
anova(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, modelo_full)

# M4 → M5: interacción hs_gpa*sex_factor
anova(modelo_full, modelo_inter)
```

```{r}

# R² ajustado (entrenamiento) + R² predictivo (test)


r2_adj_test <- function(modelo, newdata, y_real) {
  pred <- predict(modelo, newdata = newdata)
  sse  <- sum((y_real - pred)^2)
  sst  <- sum((y_real - mean(y_real))^2)
  list(
    R2_aj   = summary(modelo)$adj.r.squared,
    R2_pred = 1 - sse/sst,
    p       = length(coef(modelo)) - 1
  )
}

modelos_lista <- list(
  M1_hs_gpa      = modelo_hs_gpa,
  M2_hs_sats     = modelo_hs_sats,
  M3_hs_sats_v_m = modelo_hs_sats_v_m,
  M4_full        = modelo_full,
  M5_inter       = modelo_inter
)

comparacion_df <- map_dfr(modelos_lista, r2_adj_test,
                          newdata = satgpa_test,
                          y_real  = satgpa_test$fy_gpa,
                          .id = "modelo") |>
  mutate(modelo = factor(modelo, levels = names(modelos_lista)))

comparacion_df
```

```{r}

# Stepwise 

modelo_step <- step(modelo_inter, direction = "both", trace = 1)
summary(modelo_step)
```

```{r}

# Gráficos comparativos R^2 (train vs test)


# --- Gráfico 1: R² ajustado vs R² predictivo ---
comparacion_df |>
  pivot_longer(c(R2_aj, R2_pred), names_to = "metrica", values_to = "valor") |>
  mutate(metrica = recode(metrica,
                          R2_aj   = "R² ajustado (train)",
                          R2_pred = "R² predictivo (test)")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = modelo, y = valor, color = metrica, group = metrica)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(valor, 3)), vjust = -0.6, size = 2.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "R² ajustado vs R² predictivo por modelo",
       x = NULL, y = "R²", color = NULL) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))

# --- Gráfico 2: RMSE por modelo ---
metricas_test_rmse <- function(modelo, newdata, y_real) {
  pred <- predict(modelo, newdata = newdata)
  data.frame(RMSE = sqrt(mean((y_real - pred)^2)),
             MAE  = mean(abs(y_real - pred)))
}

map_dfr(modelos_lista, metricas_test_rmse,
        newdata = satgpa_test,
        y_real  = satgpa_test$fy_gpa,
        .id = "modelo") |>
  mutate(modelo = factor(modelo, levels = names(modelos_lista))) |>
  pivot_longer(c(RMSE, MAE), names_to = "metrica", values_to = "valor") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = modelo, y = valor, fill = modelo)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~metrica, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Error de predicción por modelo (test)",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none")

# --- Gráfico 3: predicho vs observado (M4 y M5) ---
bind_rows(
  data.frame(obs    = satgpa_test$fy_gpa,
             pred   = predict(modelo_full,  newdata = satgpa_test),
             modelo = "M4_full"),
  data.frame(obs    = satgpa_test$fy_gpa,
             pred   = predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test),
             modelo = "M5_inter")
) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = obs, y = pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~modelo) +
  labs(title = "Predicho vs observado — mejores modelos (test)",
       x = "GPA real", y = "GPA predicho") +
  theme_minimal()
```
